use std::ptr;


pub struct fastdata;
impl fastdata {

    #[must_use]
    pub fn contains(key: char) -> bool {

        key == 'a'

    pub const ITEM_COUNT: usize = 1;
    pub const MIN_KEY: char = 'a';
